task.en:
Set up a client visit across Calendar and Reminders.

1. In Calendar, create a new event titled exactly `Client Site Visit` on Thursday, October 15, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM. Put it on any calendar. When entering the date, type it rather than clicking through the month arrows.
2. In Reminders, in the default list (the first list in the sidebar), create ONE reminder titled exactly `Send visit notes to client` due the next day, Friday, October 16, 2026 at 5:00 PM.

Do not create any other events or reminders.

pre_command: for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; killall Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for TRG in $(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='trigger' AND tbl_name='CalendarItem';" 2>/dev/null); do sqlite3 "$DB" "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \"$TRG\";" 2>/dev/null; done; sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM CalendarItem WHERE summary='Client Site Visit';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$DB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] && sqlite3 "$RDB" "DELETE FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Send visit notes to client';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$RDB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; done; open -gj -a Calendar 2>/dev/null; open -gj -a Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 5
grading_command: DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; N=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT count(*) FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Client Site Visit';" 2>/dev/null); D=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT date(ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Client Site Visit' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && [ "$D" = "2026-10-15" ] && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; T1=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Client Site Visit' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); T2=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ci.end_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Client Site Visit' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T1" = "09:00" ] && [ "$T2" = "11:00" ] && echo True || echo False

SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; TOT=0; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Send visit notes to client' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); TOT=$((TOT + ${N:-0})); done; [ "$TOT" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; HIT=False; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; D=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT date(ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Send visit notes to client' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); T=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Send visit notes to client' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$D" = "2026-10-16" ] && [ "$T" = "17:00" ] && HIT=True; done; echo "$HIT"
